title: Dashboard refactored into multi-page architecture
detail: Overview, Projects, Daily Logs, Revenue, Governance, Pipeline, Blockers, and Links now live as separate pages.

title: Projects board switched to repo-backed shared data
detail: Project state now loads from repo JSON so it is visible across devices.

title: Daily log summary page added
detail: Latest 20 daily logs are listed with one-line summaries and full expandable content.

title: Two-hour dashboard refresh job created
detail: Mission Control data refreshes on a 2-hour cycle with secret sanitisation.
